interface CalculatorState {
  display: string;
  expr: string;
}

interface HandlerInput {
  state: CalculatorState;
  payload: string;
}

interface HandlerOutput {
  data?: { state: CalculatorState };
  error?: string;
}

async function handler(input: HandlerInput): Promise<HandlerOutput> {
  const { state, payload } = input;
  let { display, expr } = state;

  try {
    const action = payload;

    if (action === "clear") {
      display = "0";
      expr = "";
    } else if (action === "delete") {
      expr = expr.slice(0, -1);
      display = expr === "" ? "0" : expr;
    } else if (/^\d$/.test(action)) {
      if (expr === "" || state === input.state && display.includes("=")) {
        expr = action;
      } else {
        expr += action;
      }
      display = expr;
    } else if (["add", "subtract", "multiply", "divide"].includes(action)) {
      const operators: Record<string, string> = {
        add: "+",
        subtract: "−",
        multiply: "×",
        divide: "÷",
      };
      expr += operators[action];
      display = expr;
    } else if (action === "decimal") {
      if (!expr.includes(".")) {
        expr += ".";
        display = expr;
      }
    } else if (action === "equals") {
      if (expr) {
        const sanitized = expr
          .replace(/−/g, "-")
          .replace(/×/g, "*")
          .replace(/÷/g, "/");

        const result = Function('"use strict"; return (' + sanitized + ")")();

        if (typeof result === "number" && isFinite(result)) {
          const rounded = Math.round(result * 10000000000) / 10000000000;
          display = rounded.toString();
          expr = rounded.toString();
        } else {
          return { error: "Invalid calculation" };
        }
      }
    } else {
      return { error: `Unknown action: ${action}` };
    }

    return {
      data: {
        state: { display, expr },
      },
    };
  } catch (e) {
    return { error: `Calculation error: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}` };
  }
}
